title: sterculia thwaitesii
intro: Sterculia thwaitesii, also known as the Ceylon sterculia or the island sterculia, is a deciduous tree species native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Sterculia thwaitesii include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in treating fever and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Sterculia thwaitesii typically involve making a paste or infusion from the bark or roots, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
